packet.topic: Minimalist camping gear setup in nature
packet.aspect_ratio_reason: Classic aspect ratio suitable for travel magazines, blog posts, and environmental campaign visuals focusing on outdoor lifestyle.
packet.positive_prompt: Minimalist camping setup with tent, portable stove, backpack, natural forest or mountain background with pine trees and rocks, clear daylight or golden hour lighting, earth-tone color palette, no people, no branded gear or logos, no copyrighted designs
packet.negative_prompt: Visible brand logos, people, text overlays, watermarks, editorial content, copyrighted designs, public figures
packet.technical_specs: Sharp focus on equipment and nature, warm natural light, high resolution

parts.text: Minimalist camping gear setup with tent, stove, backpack, pine trees and rocks background, daylight or golden hour light, earthy tones, no people, no logos
